segments.text: Right, cut back with the dair, but he's at 51%
segments.original_text: そうですね 空中下で切り返したが51%

segments.text: He wants to minimize the damage and carry momentum
segments.original_text: 少しでも被ダメージを抑えて次につなげたい

segments.text: But that first stock KO we saw earlier...
segments.original_text: ただ先ほどもありましたこの1ストック目の撃墜

segments.text: The dair he landed cleanly right there
segments.original_text: ここでうまく通した空中下

full_text: Right, cut back with the dair, but he's at 51% He wants to minimize the damage and carry momentum But that first stock KO we saw earlier... The dair he landed cleanly right there
